/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneOS.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneOS26.2.sdk -miphoneos-version-min=15.0 -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/jpegtran-static.dir/src/jpegtran.c.o" "CMakeFiles/jpegtran-static.dir/src/cdjpeg.c.o" "CMakeFiles/jpegtran-static.dir/src/rdswitch.c.o" "CMakeFiles/jpegtran-static.dir/src/transupp.c.o" -o jpegtran-static  libjpeg.a
